metadata.description: Agent skills for financial analysis and trading — options payoff, stock correlations, market data, social media research, and generative UI.

plugins.name: finance-market-analysis
plugins.description: Stock analysis, earnings, estimates, correlations, liquidity, ETFs, options payoff, and trading strategies via yfinance.

plugins.name: finance-social-readers
plugins.description: Read-only social media and research feeds — Twitter/X, Discord, LinkedIn, Telegram, and Y Combinator.

plugins.name: finance-data-providers
plugins.description: External API data — sentiment via Adanos, comprehensive data via Funda AI, and Hormuz Strait monitoring.

plugins.name: finance-startup-tools
plugins.description: Startup analysis frameworks and generative UI design system for Claude widgets.
